text:
miwi        2008-02-16 17:04:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal5-workflow_ng Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Workflow-ng allows one to customize drupal's built in workflows in a very
  flexible way. In short, it's a rule-based event driven action evaluation
  system.
  
  WWW: http://drupal.org/project/workflow_ng
  
  PR:             ports/120579
  Submitted by:   Jeremy Iverson <jeremy at algenta.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1980    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/www/drupal5-workflow_ng/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/drupal5-workflow_ng/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/drupal5-workflow_ng/pkg-descr (new)
